reviews.review_title: Very fun, worth much more than chosen 3$
reviews.review_description: This game is very fun and enjoyable. I have completed the first three levels and had a lot of fun trying to solve the maps beforehand. I also enjoyed learning the unexpected challenges, even though I failed multiple times, which eventually led to faster completion. The only thing I hope to see in future updates is the ability to switch triggers for the grab button on the controller. I'm used to those buttons, and it took me a long time to adjust, but it was still fun nonetheless. I think it also could be cool to add coins to the game to collect- maybe they could pay for custom gloves/ hands or pay for a pet to follow you around. Just ideas!!

As another said, this game is made for VR only, and couldn’t be duplicated on consoles or pc. I’ve played The Climb and Climb 2 and neither were close to as fun Solve the Wall. Not to mention you get a great workout. This is one of those games where no tutorial is needed and super easy to learn, but can become surprisingly difficult finding a viable path to the top. Sometimes you’ll have to make your way back down the wall in order to move up…. Can’t say enough good things about this game, and for only $3 it’s an absolute steal. The graphics may not “wow” you but don’t mistake graphics for immersion… quality immersion is all I ask for and this game delivers. Support the dev and get this NOW. I promise for $3 you won’t regret it.  I have a feeling this game will be $15 once more levels are added so I’d jump in at the ground level now rather than wait. 

Keep up the great work! Can’t wait to see what the future holds for this one

reviews.review_title: One of the best vr games I've played
reviews.review_description: The game is really fun and the levels really force you to think. The game feels super fun beacuse its something new and fresh I think it easly lands in my top 3 favorite vr games and for 4 bucks it's a steal
